name: iFlytek Spark V4.0 (Xinghuo)
archDisplay: Proprietary transformer, trained fully on domestic (Huawei Ascend) compute
note: GPT-4-Turbo-class flagship trained on fully domestic compute; later refreshed as Spark 4.0 Turbo in October 2024.
verificationNotes: Confirmed via TechNode, Caixin Global, ChinaDaily, and IoT Now: launched June 27, 2024 in Beijing, positioned as rivaling/surpassing GPT-4 Turbo on several benchmarks, trained exclusively on the Huawei-cobuilt domestic compute platform (no Nvidia dependency) due to US chip export restrictions. Spark 4.0 Turbo follow-up in Oct 2024 also confirmed. No results rows were present to verify.
